description: Take a look at this turn-key rent ready 3/2/2 brick 1991 build in Carrollton!!! This property needs minimal work to be market ready with multiple exit strategies. This well-maintained home features an open and inviting floor plan, abundant natural light, vaulted ceilings, and a spacious living area with beautiful hardwood floors. The primary suite has hardwood flooring and a walk-in closet, while the additional bedrooms provide flexibility for family, guests, or a home office. Both bathrooms feature durable and attractive ceramic tile flooring. Conveniently located within walking distance of highly rated schools, as well as nearby parks, shopping, dining, and major highways including SH-121, I-35E, PGBT, and the Dallas North Tollway, this move-in-ready home combines comfort, convenience, and an excellent location. Buyer’s agents welcome!
